sections.paragraph:
δίϰαιος, α, ον [δίκη] ‘in accord with standards for acceptable or anticipated behavior’, upright, just

—a. gener., of being in conformity with standards for acceptable or anticipated behavior Mt 1:19; Mk 2:17; Lk 1:6; 23:47; Ac 3:14; 10:22; Ro 3:10, 26; Hb 11:4; 1 J 1:9.

—b. with focus on being fair, equitable Mt 20:4; J 5:30; Col 4:1; or characteristic of someth. that is obligatory or rightLk 12:57; Ac 4:19; Eph 6:1; Col 4:1; Phil 1:7; 4:8; 2 Th 1:6; δίϰαιον ἡγοῦμαι I consider it my responsibility 2 Pt 1:13.
